title: nephrodium incisum
intro: Nephrodium incisum, also known as the Incised Fern or Holly Fern, is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Nephrodium incisum include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory health, and acting as an antioxidant to protect against cell damage. Nephrodium incisum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
